name: 12q24_31_BCL7A_HNF1A_SD
description: 12q24.31 segmental duplication interval containing BCL7A, HNF1A and the surrounding MODY3 / lymphoma t(12;14) breakpoint cluster. BCL7A family SDs paired with BCL7B (7q11.23) and BCL7C (16p11.2) plus Alu-rich HNF1A flanks predispose to recurrent translocations.

architecture.internal_structure: Family-internal SDs of 5-20 kb to BCL7B/C and HNF1B (17q12); Alu-rich HNF1A breakpoint cluster; recurrent t(12;14) in B-cell lymphoma.
